[Coverage A - Dwelling - 35 Windstorm and Hail] [QC/other] The 'Coverage A' section is extracted as a summary-level section with only 2 items (Line Item Total and Material Sales Tax), not as individual line items. This is correct given the page structure, but the item_rcv_sum of 4113.98 double-counts the tax already included in the line item total. The true line item subtotal is 4043.64 and tax is 70.34, summing to 4113.98 RCV — this is consistent with the PDF. — Clarify that this section is a summary page, not a line-item section. The item_rcv_sum should not be used for cross-checking against individual line items.

[Dwelling Roof - MISCELLANEOUS] [QC/total_mismatch] The section totals show RCV 1250.87 for the entire Dwelling Roof, but the extracted MISCELLANEOUS sub-section claims rcv=1250.87 and acv=1130.20. However, the FRONT SLOPE items (RCV 143.81, no depreciation) are not included in the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section totals — they are separate. The Dwelling Roof total of 1250.87 includes FRONT SLOPE (143.81) + MISCELLANEOUS items (371.76 + 111.50 + 623.80 = 1107.06) + tax (23.57) = 1250.87 (confirmed). But assigning the full section total (rcv=1250.87, acv=1130.20) only to the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section is misleading — these are the totals for the entire Dwelling Roof section, not just MISCELLANEOUS. — Move the section_totals (rcv=1250.87, dep=120.67, acv=1130.20) to a parent 'Dwelling Roof' section rather than attributing them solely to the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section.

[Dwelling Roof - MISCELLANEOUS] [QC/math_error] item_rcv_sum for MISCELLANEOUS is listed as 1107.06 (371.76 + 111.50 + 623.80 = 1107.06 ✓), but the section_totals.rcv is 1250.87, which is the full Dwelling Roof total including FRONT SLOPE items and tax. The difference is 1250.87 - 1107.06 = 143.81 (FRONT SLOPE RCV) + 23.57 (tax) - 23.57 already in subtotal... The math works at the roof level but the attribution of the full roof total to only the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section creates an apparent mismatch of 143.81 in item sums vs section totals. — Either consolidate all Dwelling Roof sub-sections under one 'Dwelling Roof' parent with the combined totals, or leave section_totals null for sub-sections and only populate them at the parent level.

[Stairs] [QC/missing_items] The Stairs section on page 6 shows room dimensions (232.45 SF Walls, 22.75 SF Ceiling, 255.20 SF Walls & Ceiling, 40.62 SF Floor, 15.33 LF Ceil. Perimeter, 18.36 LF Floor Perimeter, Height 18') and a Missing Wall note, but no line items are visible on the provided pages. The extracted data correctly notes 0 items, but the section totals (RCV: 99.62, dep: 10.92, ACV: 88.70) referenced in warnings suggest line items exist on subsequent pages not provided. The Stairs - CEILING and Stairs - MISCELLANEOUS sub-sections capture these items, but they are attributed to sub-sections rather than being confirmed as complete. — Confirm whether additional Stairs line items exist on pages beyond page 6. The extracted Stairs - CEILING (Paint ceiling: RCV 81.83, dep 10.92) and Stairs - MISCELLANEOUS (Protect contents: RCV 17.79) sum to 99.62 RCV and 10.92 dep, matching the stated section total — so extraction appears complete for visible pages.

[Upstairs Living Area - MISCELLANEOUS] [QC/other] The section_totals (rcv=768.88, dep=43.87, acv=725.01) are assigned to the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section but represent the full Upstairs Living Area total (CEILING + MISCELLANEOUS combined). CEILING items sum to 519.14 RCV with 43.87 dep, and MISCELLANEOUS items sum to 249.74 RCV with 0 dep. Combined: 519.14 + 249.74 = 768.88 RCV ✓, 43.87 dep ✓, 768.88 - 43.87 = 725.01 ACV ✓. The math is correct but the total is misattributed to only the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section. — Assign section_totals to a parent 'Upstairs Living Area' section rather than only to the MISCELLANEOUS sub-section.

[totals] [QC/total_mismatch] The document-level totals show acv=3552.44, but the summary page (page 3) shows Actual Cash Value Total as -891.56 and Net Actual Cash Value Payment as $0.00. The extracted totals.acv of 3552.44 does not match the PDF summary. The value 3552.44 appears to be RCV (4113.98) minus depreciation (561.54) = 3552.44, which is the pre-deductible ACV, not the net ACV after deductible. The PDF clearly states the net payment is $0.00. — Correct totals.acv to reflect the actual ACV after deductible: -891.56 (or $0.00 net payment). Add a separate field for pre-deductible ACV of 3552.44. The current acv=3552.44 is mathematically derived but does not match the PDF's stated ACV Total of -891.56.

[totals] [QC/other] totals.subtotal is listed as 4043.64 (the Line Item Total before tax), and totals.rcv is 4113.98 (after tax). This is consistent with the PDF. However, totals.depreciation=561.54 is confirmed by the PDF summary. The deductible is listed as 4444.0 which matches the PDF ($4,444.00). Net claim of 0.00 is correct per the PDF. — No change needed for these specific fields — values are confirmed accurate.

[Recap of Taxes, Overhead and Profit - Line Items] [QC/missing_items] This section is extracted with item_count=1 and item_rcv_sum=0, with only 'Material Sales Tax (8.25%)' listed with null RCV. The warnings mention GC Overhead and GC Profit are both 0%, and total tax is 70.34. The recap page likely shows a table with multiple tax/O&P rows (Material Sales Tax, Cleaning Tax, GC Overhead %, GC Profit %) but only one is captured. The actual tax value of 70.34 is not assigned to this line item. — Assign rcv=70.34 to the Material Sales Tax line item in this section, or note that the recap page confirms the 70.34 tax total already captured in section-level tax columns.

[All sections] [QC/nrd_missed] No non-recoverable depreciation (NRD) is identified in any section. The PDF pages provided do not show an NRD column, asterisk notation, or angle-bracket indicators. All depreciation is treated as potentially recoverable (nrd=null or 0). However, the summary page shows 'Replacement Cost Benefits: -330.02' which is unusual and may indicate some NRD exists but cannot be confirmed from visible pages. — Flag all depreciation as 'recoverable pending full document review.' Request complete estimate pages to verify NRD status. The -330.02 Replacement Cost Benefits figure warrants investigation.

[Dwelling Roof - FRONT SLOPE] [QC/other] item_dep_sum=0 for FRONT SLOPE, but the two shingle items (Remove: RCV 42.85, no dep shown; Laminated: RCV 100.96, no dep shown) correctly have no depreciation listed in the PDF. This is accurate. However, the section_totals are all null — the FRONT SLOPE does not have its own subtotal row in the PDF; it rolls into the overall Dwelling Roof total. — No correction needed. Confirm null section_totals is appropriate since no separate FRONT SLOPE subtotal row exists in the PDF.

[Labor Minimums Applied] [QC/missing_items] The extracted Labor Minimums section lists 4 items summing to 702.31 RCV (361.18 + 71.52 + 62.62 + 206.99 = 702.31 ✓). These items are not visible in the provided PDF pages (pages 4-6 shown). The warnings indicate these come from pages not provided. Extraction appears to be based on data from pages beyond those visible in the images, raising a confidence concern. — Verify these line items against the actual PDF pages where Labor Minimums appear. If extracted from unseen pages, mark confidence as low until confirmed.

[Debris Removal] [QC/missing_items] The Debris Removal section (1 item: Haul debris, RCV 85.80) is not visible in the provided PDF pages (pages 4-6 shown). This appears to be extracted from pages not included in the image set, raising a confidence concern. — Verify against the actual PDF page where Debris Removal appears. Mark confidence as low until confirmed from source page.
[QC/AUTO-CORRECTED] Recap of Taxes, Overhead and Profit - Line Items | Material Sales Tax (8.25%) | rcv: None → 70.34

[QC/SUMMARY] quality=medium | The extraction captures all visible line items accurately with correct math on individual item RCV-depreciation=ACV calculations, but has two significant structural issues: (1) the document-level ACV is incorrectly reported as 3552.44 (pre-deductible) rather than the PDF-stated -891.56 net ACV, and (2) section totals for combined sections (Dwelling Roof, Upstairs Living Area, Stairs) are misattributed to sub-sections rather than parent sections, creating misleading aggregations. Several sections (Labor Minimums, Debris Removal) appear to be extracted from PDF pages not visible in the provided images, reducing verifiability. | 12 issues, 1 auto-corrected
